abstract: From raw data to business metrics, Netflix calculates more than 750 measures like: hours streamed, play delay, rebuffers… across multiple teams and at scale! Join me to understand how Scala 3 played an important role in designing the library that powers those measures, using direct style, opaque types, typeclasses, macros About Joan Goyeau Joan is a Playback Data Engineer in the Data Science and Engineering org at Netflix As a functional programming enthusiast, Scala is his weapon of choice due to its grammatical simplicity combined with its powerful features He is often contributing to Scala related open source projects like Mill, Kubernetes Client, Avro4s Learn more about Joan Goyeau on LinkedIn here: https://www.linkedin.com/in/goyeau/
event_title: Designing the library powering Netflix's QoE & Teach LLMs to write great Scala

speakers.name: Joan Goyeau
speakers.title: Joan is a Playback Data Engineer in the Data Science and Engineering org

title: Designing the library powering Netflix's QoE with Scala 3 By Joan Goyeau
